description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, single-story agricultural building with a gable roof clad in reddish-brown metal panels. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet functional appearance. The front features a large double barn door with visible black metal hinges and a central latch, suitable for livestock entry and equipment access. The roof overhangs slightly on the long sides, with exposed rafters visible beneath the eaves. There are no visible windows or ventilation features, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall structure is robust and practical, typical of rural or peri-urban agricultural settings.
description: A rectangular wooden cowshed with a red gable roof and large double barn doors, featuring a simple, utilitarian rural design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double barn doors with black metal hinges and latch, and the triangular gable end of the red roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, uninterrupted wooden wall and the full length of the red gable roof with exposed rafters.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden wall and the gable end of the roof, no doors or windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the long wooden wall and roof overhang.
attribute_door_style: double hinged barn door, wood with black metal hardware
